payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt identifies the relevant entity context as Sam from Goldman, but no stable entity_id was provided in the fixture.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory associated with Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by a newer memory.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise its supersession metadata.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If Sam from Goldman was resolved to the wrong entity, repair entity resolution by linking the memory to the correct Sam.
